text:
……本当にいいの？
頼んでおいて言うのも何だけど
かなり無理なお願いだし……

でも、これまでいつも
あなたはやってくれたものね！

今回も信じてるわ。
苦しいときは、プリップリの
おいしいお肉を思い出して

Are you sure about this? I mean, I know
I'm the one who asked in the first place, but...

Well, you've never had any problems before
though, right?

I'm sure you can handle this, too. And if you
find yourself having a hard time, just think of
that nice, juicy meat that's waiting for you!
